## Evidence
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] `pytest`, `ruff check .`, and `mypy src/triageforge` pass

## Risk
- [ ] No secrets or private repository data included
- [ ] No automatic write, merge, close, or publish behaviour added without explicit opt-in
- [ ] Untrusted issue/repository text remains treated as data
